title: Wiper blade assembly
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a wiper blade assembly (100). The wiper blade assembly comprising a wiper rubber (110) and a supporting structure (120) adapted to support the wiper rubber over a surface of a windscreen. The supporting structure comprising a first part (140), a second part (140') adapted to be coupled with the first part, and a joining component (160) adapted to couple the first part with the second part such that an overall length and curvature of the wiper blade assembly is accomplished based on at least one dimensional characteristic of the windscreen. Each of the first part, the second part, and the joining component are individually separate, and the first part (140), the second part (140'), and the joining component (160) when joined together form the supporting structure (120) for the wiper rubber (110).
